upgrade_notes: v19.1.0 minor: multi-agent advisory channels (blinded checker, typed grounding, judge-council schema) + replayable evidence (run-events, deterministic/trajectory smokes) + release zip triad + clean-install + coverage-meta (ADR-012/013; docs/release-notes/v19.1.md). v19.0.4 patch: core-boundary-contract refresh (runtime/*_impl map); validate_release REQUIRED_GATES + smoke_cli_v19 + _smoke_corrupt_render; ADR-011 committed release-validation-transcript policy. v19.0.3 patch: fail-closed rollback minimal_valid + physical rollback stub; V6 semantic fixes (DELIV-STUB-EXT, DELIV-ATT-MISSING, DELIV-STUB-FORBIDDEN-ATTACHMENT); V1 walker oneOf/anyOf/allOf semantics; release B4 REQUIRED_GATES + dual Telegram smokes (v18 + RFO_V19_PROFILE=mvr); ADR-009/010 vocabulary/root patterns; validation-transcript schema REC-1 root permissive; state-machine queued→validation_failed. Prior v19.0.2: KISS validation-profile-used; V2 role_for_claim; V6 DELIV-EXT-CLI; semver-only strings. v19.0.0 phase 1: schemas/core + validation-profiles; validators/core V1–V6; run_core_validators + check_validation_pass; RFO_V19_PROFILE; SKILL-core.md; migrate_validator_invocation.py; index-v19.json. v18.7.0: LC01–LC16, F201–F207, FTM. v18.5.1: fail-closed rollback; delivery validators.
